sqlMap.select: select a.mem_id, a.mem_pass, a.mem_type, a.mem_name, b.mem_email, b.mem_tel, b.mem_birth, b.mem_cupon, b.mem_blocation from mem_detail b, member a where a.mem_id = b.mem_id and a.mem_id = #mem_id#
sqlMap.update: update mem_detail set mem_email = #mem_email#, mem_tel = #mem_tel#, mem_birth = #mem_birth#, mem_blocation = #mem_blocation# where mem_id = #mem_id#
update member set mem_pass = #mem_pass# where mem_id = #mem_id#
